zh.lifeSummary: 當Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen於1340年出生在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 格廷根時，他的父親Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen35歲，母親Elisabeth Von Hessen18歲。他於大約1357年與Mirislava von Holstein-Plön結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1394年12月13日在德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆哈德森享年54歲，埋葬在德國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen于1340年出生在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 格廷根时，他的父亲Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen35岁，母亲Elisabeth Von Hessen18岁。他于大约1357年与Mirislava von Holstein-Plön结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1394年12月13日在德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆哈德森享年54岁，埋葬在德国。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

en.lifeSummary: When Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen was born in 1340, in Göttingen, Lower Saxony, Germany, his father, Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen, was 35 and his mother, Elisabeth Von Hessen, was 18. He married Mirislava von Holstein-Plön about 1357. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 13 December 1394, in Hardegsen, Northeim, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 54, and was buried in Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen est né en 1340, à Landkreis Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, son père, Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Von Hessen, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mirislava von Holstein-Plön environ 1357. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 13 décembre 1394, à Hardegsen, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen 1340 in Landkreis Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen 35 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Von Hessen 18. Er hat um 1357 Mirislava von Holstein-Plön geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 13. Dezember 1394 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Hardegsen, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen è nato il nel 1340 nel Landkreis Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Germania, il suo padre, Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Von Hessen, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mirislava von Holstein-Plön circa 1357. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 13 dicembre 1394, nel Hardegsen, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingenが1340年にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス グoッティンジェンで生まれた時，父Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingenは35歳，母Elisabeth Von Hessenは18歳であった。約1357年にMirislava von Holstein-Plönと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1394年12月13日にドイツニーダーサチセンランドクレイス ノースエイムハーデグセンで54歳で死去し，ドイツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen(이)가 1340년 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 그o틴겐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Von Hessen(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1357년 Mirislava von Holstein-Plön(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1394년 12월 13일 독일 니더작센 랜드크레이스 노르테임 하르데그센에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen nasceu em 1340, em Landkreis Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Von Hessen, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mirislava von Holstein-Plön aproximadamente 1357. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 13 de dezembro de 1394, em Hardegsen, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen родился в 1340 г. в местности ландкрис гoттинген, ниедирсачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Von Hessen, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mirislava von Holstein-Plön около 1357 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 13 декабря 1394 г. в местности хардегсен, ландкрис нортим, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Otto I. von Braunschweig-Göttingen nació en 1340, en Landkreis Göttingen, Niedersachsen, Alemania, su papá, Ernst Herzog von Braunschweig-Göttingen, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Von Hessen, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mirislava von Holstein-Plön aproximadamente 1357. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 13 de diciembre de 1394, en Hardegsen, Landkreis Northeim, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Alemania.
